title: To Adventure
description: Explore new custom biomes, upgrade your skills, and battle unique monsters in your journey — your adventure begins here!
body:
## 🧭 To Adventure

**Explore. Fight. Evolve.**

**To Adventure** brings a brand-new exploration and progression experience to Minecraft.  
Travel through **new custom biomes**, **level up your skills**, and **battle dangerous monsters** as you grow stronger through your adventure!

***

### 🔹 Current Features:

*   A **Leveling/Stats** System
*   **Custom mobs** that make combat exciting\[**WIP**\]
*   **New biomes** to explore
*   **Unique items** to enhance your journey

***

### 🔸 Planned Updates:

*   More **biomes** to discover
*   More **items** to expand gameplay
